title: convert numeric
text: convert numeric Enables data to be correctly retrieved when the length of a numeric database field is longer than the length defined in the Uniface field interface definition. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = convert numeric This is a compatibility option that is applicable to SYB U5.1 connector and higher. Use this connector option only if you encounter the problem it is designed to solve. When using the convert numeric option, any existing stored procedures must be replaced. If U2 stored procedures must be kept in the database, use the Create Table utility with the convert numeric connector option to generate an SQL script. Then edit the SQL script to remove the create table command, leaving the script that will drop and create the stored procedures. If no U2 stored procedures need to be kept, use the Create Table facility with both the upgrade procs and convert numeric options to generate SQL scripts that will drop and create stored procedures. Related Links Create Table Facility for Sybase The Create Table facility (/genSql createtable) is fully supported. Sybase Stored Procedures The SYB connector supports the use of Sybase stored procedures. These can also be activated as service stored procedures. upgrade procs Upgrade Sybase connector U2 stored procedures to match the current version. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
